title: Sygnum launches service targeting $100B corporate crypto treasury market
snippet: The Swiss crypto bank will handle strategic asset allocation for corporate crypto treasuries and is already actively managing $200 million in volume at launch.

title: Gate secures Maltese payments license to expand EU fiat and stablecoin services
snippet: The license allows Gate to execute payment transactions in the EU, including direct debits and credit transfers under PSD2 rules.

title: OCC requests comments on proposal to implement the Genius Act
snippet: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) today issued a proposed rulemaking to implement the Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins (GENIUS) Act.

title: Deutsche Bank-backed AllUnity launches Swiss franc stablecoin CHFAU
snippet: Initially available to institutions via the AllUnity Mint Platform, CHFAU stablecoin launches under MiCA compliance after securing a license from the German regulator, BaFin.

title: Tokenized US Treasurys rise by over $1B since start of 2026
snippet: The tokenized US Treasury market had a market capitalization of under $4 billion at the start of 2025 and has been gradually rising.

title: Revolut wins FCA backing for stablecoin testing despite licence limbo

title: Revolut among firms picked by UK FCA to test stablecoin sandbox
snippet: Both the FCA and the Bank of England are working in concert to develop a comprehensive set of regulations for stablecoins.

title: Revolut among cohort testing stablecoin plans with the FCA
snippet: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has selected Monee Financial Technologies, ReStabilise, Revolut and VVTX, as the first four firms to test stablecoin innovation in its regulatory sandbox.

title: Revolut among 4 companies chosen to test stablecoins in UK sandbox
snippet: The UK Financial Conduct Authority selected Monee, ReStabilise, Revolut and VVTX to test stablecoin issuance and payments in its regulatory sandbox beginning in Q1 2026.

title: WLFI proposes governance staking system and USD1 usage incentives
snippet: World Liberty Financial’s USD1 is the fifth-largest stablecoin by market capitalization at $4.7 billion, while USDT is the market leader, followed by USDC.

title: Circle beats Q4 earnings estimates as USDC supply jumps 72%, shares surge 20%
snippet: The stablecoin issuer reported $770 million in revenue for the final 2025 quarter, beating forecasts as full-year sales rose 64% and USDC circulation topped $75 billion.

title: Democrat Senator Launches $1.7B Iran Sanctions Probe Into Binance
snippet: Senator Richard Blumenthal has launched an inquiry into alleged Iran-linked crypto transfers as Binance pushes back against the claims.

title: Coinbase launches stock trading, but tokenized stocks are the real ambition
snippet: Coinbase this week launched conventional stock and ETF trading for all US customers, offering zero commission trades alongside crypto in a single app. It includes a Yahoo Finance marketing partnership and 24/5 trading hours. title: OCC proposal seeks to settle stablecoin yield debate, clearing way for CLARITY
snippet: The OCC’s proposal to implement the GENIUS Act would bar yield on payment stablecoins and introduce a rebuttable presumption against common issuer–affiliate reward structures.

title: Kraken introduces fixed-rate crypto loans for its Pro users
snippet: The crypto exchange’s new Flexline product lets Pro users borrow against digital assets at fixed rates of 10%–25% APR for terms of up to two years.
